prompt_md: Each item on the left is a future change a system might need. Match it to the seam (on the right) that would absorb that change without forcing a rewrite of the surrounding code.

left: Support a second email vendor in addition to the current one
Let customers pay with a new payment provider
Add an in-app notification channel alongside email
Allow administrators to switch the app's storage backend
right: An email-sender interface that any vendor implementation can satisfy
A payment-provider interface each provider implements behind a common method
A notifier interface with a single send(user, message) method
A storage interface the rest of the app depends on instead of a concrete backend
